info.name: IAM 3.0 — CLET/GSL Identity & Access Management
info.description:
# IAM 3.0 API Collection

Centralised Identity, Authentication, Authorisation & Access-Control Platform.

**Base URL:** `{{baseUrl}}`

## Auth

| Scheme | Where |
|--------|-------|
| **JWT Bearer** — `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` | Admin API (`/v1/admin/*`), Self-Service (`/v1/me`), PAM (`/pam/*`) |
| **SCIM Bearer** — `Authorization: Bearer <scim_token>` | SCIM endpoints (`/scim/v2/*`) |
| **HMAC-SHA256** — `X-Signature` header | Delegation webhook (`/delegation/webhook`) |
| **HMAC-SHA256** — `X-Hub-Signature-256` header | HRMS webhook (`/scim/v2/hrms-webhook`) |
| **Session cookie** | Login flow (`/login/*`) |

## Variables

| Variable | Initial | Description |
|----------|---------|-------------|
| `baseUrl` | `http://localhost:8000` | Django dev server |
| `jwtToken` | — | Set via Login → Callback test script |
| `scimToken` | `dev-scim-token-change-in-prod` | From `config/settings/dev.py` |
| `adminUserId` | — | Created by Admin → Create User |
| `adminRoleId` | — | Created by Admin → Create Role |
| `adminClientId` | — | Created by Admin → Create Client |
| `pamSessionId` | — | Created by PAM → Start Session |

item.name: Health
item.description: Liveness and readiness probes for container orchestration.

request.description: Returns {status: alive}. Does not check dependencies.
Returns {status: ready} when DB connection is valid.

item.name: Login (HTMX)
item.description: Browser-based login flow rendered as HTMX templates. These are HTML pages, not JSON APIs.

query.description: Optional — Zitadel auth request ID when redirected from IdP

request.description: Renders the branded HTMX login form.

query.description: Omit or pass empty when testing locally

request.description: Submits credentials to Zitadel via the auth service. Expects HTML re-render with error messaging on failure.
TOTP challenge page.
WebAuthn (Passkey / FIDO2) challenge page.
SMS OTP challenge page.
OAuth consent screen — user approves requested scopes.
Password reset request form.
Generic error page rendered by the IdP redirect on failure.
Redirects back to Zitadel callback to complete OIDC flow. Expects 302.

exec: // If using Postman flows, extract a JWT from the Zitadel callback URL
// and persist it as the collection variable jwtToken for subsequent requests.
// This requires a Zitadel dev instance and a configured OIDC client.

item.name: OpenID Connect RP
item.description: OIDC Relying Party endpoints — logout and backchannel.

request.description: Clears local Django session then redirects to Zitadel end_session endpoint.

urlencoded.description: JWT logout token from Zitadel containing sub, sid, and events claim

request.description: Zitadel-initiated backchannel logout. Decodes logout token and revokes active sessions.
Returns authenticated user profile. Requires valid JWT from Zitadel.

item.name: SCIM 2.0
item.description:
System for Cross-domain Identity Management v2.0 — provision/manage users from upstream HR systems.

**Auth:** Bearer token in SCIM_BEARER_TOKEN env var.

request.description: Creates user in Zitadel (via provisioning backend) and local Django User record.
Returns SCIM User resource by internal Django user UUID.
Partial update of email and/or metadata.
Deactivates user in Zitadel and sets Django user status to disabled.

header.description: HMAC-SHA256 of body, prefixed with sha256=. Secret is DJANGO_SECRET_KEY.

request.description: HRMS lifecycle webhook — events: user.joiner, user.mover, user.leaver. Dispatches to Celery task.
Requests without a valid SCIM bearer token receive a 401 response.

item.name: Admin API
item.description:
Administrative REST API for IAM management. All endpoints require JWT auth and IsIAMAdmin permission (user_type = staff).

**Auth:** Authorization: Bearer {{jwtToken}}

query.description: Filter: staff, board, nbec, student, external, public

request.description: Paginated user list with filters.
Creates user in Zitadel (dual-write) and local DB. Emits user.created audit event.
Returns a single user profile by UUID.
Partial update. Emits user.updated audit event.
Deactivates user in Zitadel and sets local status to disabled. Emits user.deactivated.
Bulk-creates users with per-record error handling. Emits user.bulk_import audit event.
Returns role catalogue, optionally filtered by system code.
Creates a new role in the versioned catalogue. Emits role.created audit event.
Returns a single role with permission strings and version info.

body.raw:
{
  "description": "Updated: Full access to IAM console (including audit export)",
  "permission_strings": [
    "iam:users:read",
    "iam:users:write",
    "iam:roles:read",
    "iam:roles:write",
    "iam:clients:read",
    "iam:clients:write",
    "iam:audit:read",
    "iam:audit:export"
  ]
}

request.description: Partial update. Emits role.updated audit event.
Binds role to user with expiry window. Creates RoleBinding in APPROVED state. Emits role.bound.

query.description: Filter: onboarding, sandbox_validated, production_live, suspended, decommissioned

request.description: Client list with lifecycle state filter.

Registers OIDC client in onboarding state. Emits client.created audit event.

Must pass compliance gates before promotion to sandbox/production.
Returns client config including lifecycle state, redirect URIs, and compliance status.

Promotes client to production_live state. Requires compliance_gate_passed = true.

Returns 400 if gate not passed.
Search the append-only audit log. Returns paginated results with meta.
Returns latest audit chain anchor with integrity status.

item.name: Delegation
item.description:
Delegation webhook — receives grant/revoke events from external systems (System 22).

**Auth:** X-Signature header with HMAC-SHA256 of body.

header.description: HMAC-SHA256 hex digest of body using DJANGO_SECRET_KEY

request.description: Grants a role delegation. Looks up users by zitadel_user_id. Creates Delegation in ACTIVE state.
Revokes an active delegation by ID. Sets state to revoked.
Demonstrates 401 when X-Signature header is missing.

item.name: PAM
item.description: Privileged Access Management — record and audit privileged sessions.

request.description: Records start of a privileged session (SSH, RDP, DB console). Returns session UUID and status.
Ends PAM session with recording URI and SHA-256 hash for audit integrity.
